acceptance_criteria:
1. configure_prompt_env function
2. Custom formatter detects JinjaPromptValue via downcast
3. Routes to render_prompt_value for typed values
4. None prints 'null'
5. Falls back to default for other values
6. Strict mode errors propagate correctly
7. Integration test: {{ typed_value }} renders correctly
8. cargo test passes
title: Install custom formatter in PromptWorld Jinja environment

description: Run cargo check, cargo test, and cargo clippy -- -D warnings after completing dsrs-ohh.10 to confirm integration tests and typed pipeline changes stay green.
title: Phase 9 verification: cargo check/test/clippy

description:
# Task

Run the full verification suite after Phase 8 changes.

Commands (from repo root):
```bash
cargo check
cargo test
cargo clippy -- -D warnings
```

Acceptance Criteria:
- cargo check succeeds
- cargo test succeeds
- cargo clippy succeeds with -D warnings
title: Phase 8 verification: cargo check/test/clippy

description: Test SUBMIT accepts Python variables, returns typed output. Test DSPy-exact error formats: '[Error] Missing output fields: ...', '[Type Error] field: expected...', constraint failures. Test soft checks produce warnings, hard asserts block.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content:
Plan-derived test focus: SUBMIT conversion + DSPy error strings.
- Missing fields yields DSPy-style error: "Missing output fields" + `Use SUBMIT(...)` guidance.
- Type coercion failures return "[Type Error]" style message.
- Assert failures block completion when strict.
- Ensure __baml__ hook, dict/list/primitives, and jsonish string→type coercion paths are covered.

title: Task 7.4: Test SUBMIT conversion and DSPy error strings
